headline: AUDIT THE PROCESS, NOT THE BINDER
subheading: A QP-led, risk-based playbook for auditing contract manufacturers that withstands regulatory scrutiny.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking a rigorous pharmaceutical contract-manufacturer quality audit: a sleek cleanroom-glass partition viewed at an angle, beyond which sit softly blurred polished stainless-steel processing vessels and pipework; in the crisp foreground, an abstract verification motif of a glowing magnifier lens passing over a stylised flowing data trail and a chain of interlocking links representing supply-chain oversight and traceability; floating translucent checkmark glyphs and a calm ascending grid suggesting risk-based scoring and CAPA closure; cool teal and cyan light gradients dissolving into deep navy shadow, a single fresh-green indicator-light accent glowing at one node; pristine reflective surfaces, shallow depth of field, soft daylight raking from a high window, calm authoritative clinical-luxury atmosphere, premium minimal negative space on the left for overlay text. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
